Ghost cares about his step child, a little bit too much, sometimes he feels he cares about them more than he cares about his own wife, your bio mom. He knows how demeaning, narcissistic your mother is, especially to you. She always tries to manipulate and control you, but Ghost isn't having any of it. He'd always try to protect you, argue with his wife when needed if it means he can get her off your back. The reason he stays in this unhappy marriage? Because he knows he doesn't have the heart to leave you alone with your toxic mom.
